data.content:
# 构建阶段
FROM node:18-alpine as build
WORKDIR /app
COPY package.json ./
RUN npm install
COPY . .
RUN npm run build

# 运行阶段
FROM nginx:alpine
COPY --from=build /app/build /usr/share/nginx/html
EXPOSE 80
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

services:
  backend:
    build: ./backend
    container_name: park-backend
    ports:
      - "8000:8000"
    restart: unless-stopped

  frontend:
    build: ./frontend
    container_name: park-frontend
    ports:
      - "3005:80"
    environment:
      - REACT_APP_API_URL=http://localhost:8000
    depends_on:
      - backend
    restart: unless-stopped

FROM python:3.11-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
COPY . .
EXPOSE 8000
CMD ["uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000"]

payload.name: write
payload.arguments:
{"path": "frontend/Dockerfile", "content": "# 构建阶段
FROM node:18-alpine as build
WORKDIR /app
COPY package.json ./
RUN npm install
COPY . ./
RUN npm run build

# 运行阶段 - 使用 Python 轻量 HTTP 服务器（python:3.11-slim 已从后端构建缓存）
FROM python:3.11-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=build /app/build /app/build
EXPOSE 8000
CMD ["python", "-m", "http.server", "8000", "--directory", "/app/build"]"}

    container_name: park-backend
    ports:
      - "8000:8000"
    restart: unless-stopped

  frontend:
    build: ./frontend
    container_name: park-frontend
    ports:
      - "3005:8000"
    environment:
      - REACT_APP_API_URL=http://localhost:8000
    depends_on:
      - backend
    restart: unless-stopped"}

fastapi==0.109.0
uvicorn==0.27.0

data.content:
# 构建阶段 - 使用 node:18-alpine 构建 React 应用
FROM node:18-alpine as build
WORKDIR /app
COPY package.json ./
RUN npm install
COPY . ./
RUN npm run build

# 运行阶段 - 使用 python:3.11-slim 提供静态文件（该镜像已从后端构建缓存）
FROM python:3.11-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=build /app/build /app/build
EXPOSE 8000
CMD ["python", "-m", "http.server", "8000", "--directory", "/app/build"]

services:
  backend:
    build: ./backend
    container_name: park-backend
    ports:
      - "8000:8000"
    restart: unless-stopped

  frontend:
    build: ./frontend
    container_name: park-frontend
    ports:
      - "3005:8000"
    environment:
      - REACT_APP_API_URL=http://localhost:8000
    depends_on:
      - backend
    restart: unless-stopped

# 构建阶段 - 使用 node:18-alpine 构建 React 应用

COPY . .
EXPOSE 8000
CMD ["uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000"]

{"path": "frontend/Dockerfile", "content": "# 单阶段构建 - 使用 node:18-alpine 运行开发服务器
FROM node:18-alpine
WORKDIR /app
COPY package.json ./
RUN npm install --registry=https://registry.npmmirror.com
COPY . ./
EXPOSE 3000
CMD ["npm", "start"]"}

{"path": "docker-compose.yml", "content": "services:

  frontend:
    build: ./frontend
    container_name: park-frontend
    ports:
      - "3005:3000"
    environment:
      - REACT_APP_API_URL=http://localhost:8000
      - WATCHPACK_POLLING=true
    depends_on:
      - backend
    restart: unless-stopped"}

FROM python:3.11-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
COPY . .
EXPOSE 8000
CMD ["uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000"]

FROM python:3.11-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
COPY . .
EXPOSE 8005
CMD ["uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8005"]

FROM node:18-alpine
WORKDIR /app
COPY package.json ./
RUN npm install --registry=https://registry.npmmirror.com
COPY . ./
ENV PORT=3005
EXPOSE 3005
CMD ["npm", "start"]

services:
  backend:
    build: ./backend
    container_name: park5-backend
    ports:
      - "8005:8005"
    restart: unless-stopped

  frontend:
    build: ./frontend
    container_name: park5-frontend
    ports:
      - "3005:3005"
    environment:
      - PORT=3005
      - REACT_APP_API_URL=http://localhost:8005
      - WATCHPACK_POLLING=true
    depends_on:
      - backend
    restart: unless-stopped

services:
  backend:
    build: ./backend
    container_name: park5-backend
    ports:
      - "8005:8005"
    restart: unless-stopped

  frontend:

    environment:
      - PORT=3005
      - REACT_APP_API_URL=http://localhost:8005
      - WATCHPACK_POLLING=true
    depends_on:
      - backend
    restart: unless-stopped

COPY . ./
ENV PORT=3005
EXPOSE 3005

COPY . .
